title: Settings
subtitle: Manage notifications, security, and app information.
pushHint: Choose which activity can appear as device notifications.
emailHint: Choose which updates should also arrive by email.
saveError: Could not save setting. Please try again.
securityHint: Keep your account access up to date.

password.title: Change Password
password.hint: Enter your current password, then choose a new one.
password.reviewSubtitle: Save only when your new password and confirmation match.
password.successMessage: Your password has been updated successfully.

validation.mismatch: New password and confirmation do not match.
validation.tooShort: New password must be at least 8 characters.

password.changeError: Could not change password. Please try again.

identity.verified_body: Your identity has been verified. The ID verified label is now visible on your profile.
identity.failed_body: We were unable to verify your identity.
identity.dob_body: We need your date of birth so it can be matched against your government-issued ID.
identity.mobile_payment_body: Identity verification costs {{fee}}. Complete the secure payment here in the app, then continue to identity checks.
identity.in_progress_body: Complete the Stripe verification flow in the opened window. This page will update when the result is available.
identity.start_body: Submit your government-issued ID and a selfie to earn the ID verified label.
identity.error_save_dob: Failed to save date of birth. Please try again.
identity.error_check_status: Unable to check verification status. Please try again.
identity.error_missing_dob: Please enter your date of birth.
identity.error_start_verification: Unable to start verification. Please try again later.
identity.error_create_payment: Unable to create the secure payment. Please try again.
identity.error_missing_publishable_key: Secure mobile payment is not configured yet. Please use the web verification flow.
identity.payment_success_body: Your verification fee has been paid. You can now start the identity check.
identity.hint: Start or review your Stripe identity verification status.

accountHint: Profile, identity verification, and account security.
editProfileHint: Update your public profile, contact details, and avatar.
changePasswordHint: Change the password used to sign in.

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.hint: Control who can find, view, and contact you.
privacy.saveError: Could not save privacy settings. Please try again.

blockedUsers.title: Blocked users
blockedUsers.settingsHint: Review members you have blocked and unblock them if needed.
blockedUsers.subtitle: Blocked members cannot contact you or interact with your profile.
blockedUsers.emptyDesc: People you block will appear here.
blockedUsers.unblockConfirmBody: They will be able to contact you again according to your privacy settings.
blockedUsers.loadError: Could not load blocked users. Please try again.
blockedUsers.unblockError: Could not unblock this user. Please try again.

dataExport.title: Data export
dataExport.settingsHint: Request a copy of your account data and view recent exports.
dataExport.subtitle: Download a portable copy of the personal data stored for your account.
dataExport.intro: Exports may include profile details, exchange history, messages, preferences, and related activity.
dataExport.warning: Keep exported files private. They may contain personal or sensitive information.
dataExport.loadError: Could not load export history. Please try again.
dataExport.requestedBody: Your export request has been submitted. Refresh this screen to see the latest history.
dataExport.requestError: Could not request your export. Please try again.

format.label: Export format
format.jsonHelp: Best for portability and machine-readable backups.
format.zipHelp: Best when the export includes multiple files.

history.title: Export history
history.emptyDesc: Your completed export requests will appear here.

translation.title: Translation preferences
translation.settingsHint: Control automatic translation and feed ordering.
translation.subtitle: Choose how multilingual content appears across your mobile app.
translation.latestFeedHint: Turn this on to prefer chronological activity over personalised ranking.
translation.autoTranslateHint: When enabled, content already translated to your chosen language is shown automatically.
translation.savedBody: Your language and translation preferences have been updated.
translation.loadError: Could not load translation preferences. Please try again.
translation.saveError: Could not save translation preferences. Please try again.
